release_notes.zh:
1. 新增恩阶BMS协议支持
2. 新增电池数据详情页与通用数据展示组件
3. 完成全量国际化适配，支持中英文切换
4. 新增用户协议与隐私政策页面
5. 修复容量解析和电压显示单位问题
release_notes.en:
1. Added Enjie BMS protocol support
2. Added battery data detail page
3. Full i18n support with Chinese/English switching
4. Added user agreement and privacy policy pages
5. Fixed capacity parsing and voltage display unit issues
